message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "should apply -20% loyalty discount when customer has >= 2 years with MHPCO"
Expected: 95 G for sword (newcomer-style, ench 3, not cursed) but customer has 2 years with MHPCO. Calc: 100 base - 20 loyalty + 10 first-ins + 5 fee = 95.
Current error: Expected 95, Received 115
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

Implement: Customer with yearsWithMHPCO >= 2 gets -20% loyalty discount on the policy base (sum of item base premiums). Per spec, "loyalty discount applies to the policy base premium (the sum of all item base premiums)".

Approach: Track sum of item BASE premiums (not surcharged). Apply -20% to this base. Add to other surcharges/etc. Or simplest: keep current itemsPremium (which adds bases + per-item surcharges + first-ins), and additionally subtract 0.2 * sumOfBases when customer has >= 2 years.

Check the integration example at line 207-208: "100 G base + 50 G curse + 30 G high enchantment − 20 G loyalty + 10 G first insurance − 15 G follow-up contract = 155 G + 5 G fee = 160 G"
So for 3-year customer cursed sword ench 7: 100 base + 50 curse + 30 high ench - 20 loyalty (20% of 100 base) + 10 first ins - 15 follow-up. Loyalty discount is 20% of policy BASE (sum of item bases, not surcharged amount).

For this test: sword base 100, sum of bases = 100. Loyalty -20% = -20. Plus per-item first-ins +10 (10% of 100 base). Plus 5 fee. = 95.

Implementation: Add `customer` to Scenario type with yearsWithMHPCO. Compute sumOfBases. If years >= 2, subtract 0.2 * sumOfBases from itemsPremium. Then add fee.

Run tests with: cd /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_02-31-52_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7 && pnpm test

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text:
All 19 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added `customer` to the Scenario type, tracked `sumOfBases` alongside `itemsPremium`, and subtracted 20% of `sumOfBases` from `itemsPremium` when `customer.yearsWithMHPCO >= 2`.
**Result**: All tests now pass (19 passing, 18 todo).
**Approach**: Minimal change — only added what the failing test demanded. The loyalty discount is computed against the sum of item base premiums (per spec) by tracking bases as we iterate the items, then applied conditionally based on the customer's tenure.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
